steps.t: Lhan Tarren, the village of Elain of the Stag-clan, lies to the south of where you found her. You have been urged to seek the hospitality of the humbl…
Elain made it safely back to her village, Lhan Tarren. You should speak with Elain briefly before presenting yourself to the Elder of the Stag-clan in…
The Elder of Lhan Tarren is inside the bounds of the village. You should speak with the Elder, for he wishes to thank you for your kindness to Elain.
